query:
INSERT INTO broadcast_schedules (id, title, description, type, start_time, end_time, days_of_week, content_url, is_active, priority, created_at, updated_at) VALUES
(1, 'Morning Gospel Hour', 'Start the day with uplifting gospel music and inspirational messages', 'music', '06:00:00', '08:00:00', 'Mon,Tue,Wed,Thu,Fri,Sat,Sun', '/streams/morning-gospel', 1, 10, NOW(), NOW()),
(2, 'Legacy Stories', 'Stories from the Rockin Rockin Boogie legacy - family history and achievements', 'podcast', '08:00:00', '09:00:00', 'Mon,Tue,Wed,Thu,Fri', '/streams/legacy-stories', 1, 9, NOW(), NOW()),
(3, 'Little Richard Connection', 'Music and stories celebrating the Little Richard connection', 'music', '09:00:00', '10:00:00', 'Mon,Wed,Fri', '/streams/little-richard', 1, 8, NOW(), NOW()),
(4, 'Midday Music Mix', 'A curated mix of R&B, soul, and gospel classics', 'music', '10:00:00', '12:00:00', 'Mon,Tue,Wed,Thu,Fri,Sat,Sun', '/streams/midday-mix', 1, 7, NOW(), NOW()),
(5, 'Sweet Miracles Hour', 'Updates from Sweet Miracles NPO - community impact stories', 'podcast', '12:00:00', '13:00:00', 'Tue,Thu', '/streams/sweet-miracles', 1, 8, NOW(), NOW()),
(6, 'Afternoon Soul Sessions', 'Deep cuts and rare tracks from the soul and R&B archives', 'music', '13:00:00', '15:00:00', 'Mon,Tue,Wed,Thu,Fri,Sat,Sun', '/streams/soul-sessions', 1, 6, NOW(), NOW()),
(7, 'HybridCast Live', 'Live broadcast via HybridCast - community voices and emergency updates', 'live', '15:00:00', '16:00:00', 'Mon,Wed,Fri', '/streams/hybridcast-live', 1, 9, NOW(), NOW()),
(8, 'Healing Frequencies', '432Hz and 528Hz healing frequency sessions for wellness', 'music', '16:00:00', '17:00:00', 'Mon,Tue,Wed,Thu,Fri,Sat,Sun', '/streams/healing-frequencies', 1, 7, NOW(), NOW()),
(9, 'Evening Jazz & Blues', 'Smooth jazz and blues for the evening wind-down', 'music', '17:00:00', '19:00:00', 'Mon,Tue,Wed,Thu,Fri,Sat,Sun', '/streams/evening-jazz', 1, 6, NOW(), NOW()),
(10, 'Canryn Production Showcase', 'Featuring productions from Canryn Production and subsidiaries', 'podcast', '19:00:00', '20:00:00', 'Sat', '/streams/canryn-showcase', 1, 8, NOW(), NOW()),
(11, 'Night Meditation', 'Guided meditation with healing frequencies for restful sleep', 'music', '20:00:00', '22:00:00', 'Mon,Tue,Wed,Thu,Fri,Sat,Sun', '/streams/night-meditation', 1, 7, NOW(), NOW()),
(12, 'Late Night Classics', 'Classic R&B and soul through the night hours', 'music', '22:00:00', '06:00:00', 'Mon,Tue,Wed,Thu,Fri,Sat,Sun', '/streams/late-night', 1, 5, NOW(), NOW()),
(13, 'Sunday Service', 'Sunday morning worship and gospel celebration', 'live', '08:00:00', '11:00:00', 'Sun', '/streams/sunday-service', 1, 10, NOW(), NOW()),
(14, 'Family Achievement Hour', 'Celebrating family achievements and milestones', 'podcast', '14:00:00', '15:00:00', 'Sat', '/streams/family-achievements', 1, 8, NOW(), NOW()),
(15, 'Emergency Broadcast Channel', 'Reserved for emergency alerts and community safety updates', 'emergency', '00:00:00', '23:59:59', 'Mon,Tue,Wed,Thu,Fri,Sat,Sun', '/streams/emergency', 1, 100, NOW(), NOW());
